metadata.description:
Generates heavy-music drum MIDI patterns in REAPER.
Covers blast beats, djent, thall, death metal, black metal, grindcore, metalcore, doom, sludge, progressive metal, and thrash. Includes 4 MIDI map presets with an in-script editor, power hand control, configurable time signatures (4/4, 3/4, 7/8, 5/4), humanize/push-pull timing, and auto tom fills.
Requirements: REAPER 6.0+, ReaImGui 0.8+

version.author: Wretcher
version.changelog: Fix crash on close when ReaImGui_DestroyContext is unavailable in older ReaImGui versions.
